_comment: Copy this to config.json (the setup wizard does this for you). Every field the writing engine reads lives here. Delete the _comment lines in your real config if you like.
_language_help: One of en-GB, en-US, en-CA, en-AU, or another variant. Applied to spelling, dates, currency, idiom.
voice: warm, practical, expert; plain language; writes like a person, not a brochure
_banned_words_help: Added on top of the built-in banned list in references/writing-engine.md. Leave [] if none.
_output_mode_help: 'cms' = WordPress self-hosted draft via scripts/publish.mjs (needs the local Node step). 'document' = deliver each article as Markdown + .docx to upload yourself.

cms._note: Category IDs are WordPress-specific. Fill from your site. Credentials live in .env, never here.

_cadence_help: weekly | biweekly | monthly | on-demand. Used only to offer a scheduled task.
_attribution_help: true appends a small LinkedIn + Buy Me a Coffee footer to each article and shows it once after setup. Set false to turn it off.
